The OS for
Construciton
Supply Chains

Stop managing spreadsheets and start orchestrating your site. Intellibyld uses a Construction-Trained SLM to turn fragmented logistics into Autonomous Execution, keeping your project on schedule and your carbon footprint on target.

Request Free DemoTry For Free
What is Intellibyld?
The AI Powered OS that orchestrates your 
construction supply chain through
  Autonomous Execution

Construction-Trained Intelligence

Our Small Language Model(SLM) is fine-tuned specifically on construction data, allowing it to understand the deep nuances of project logistics and make high-stakes autonomous decisions.

Real-Time Digital Twins

We build a live virtual map of every material's journey. Spot threats and identify opportunities before they disrupt your site, keeping your schedule perfectly in sync.

Agentic Workflow Automation

Seamlessly integrate with BIM, ERP, and PM software. Our Agentic AI automates RFQs, shipment tracking, and bidding evaluations so your team can focus on building.

Documentation
Building Automated AI Code Documentation Generation

Nam libero tempore cum soluta nobis esteligendi optio cumque nihil impedit quo minus id quod maxime placeat

  • Save time — Rapid AI-driven generation.
  • No Outdates — Continuous code documentation refresh.
  • Consistency — Consistent code documentation.
